name: Country Captain Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour very hot water over the currents or raisins in a separate bowl. Let stand for 20 minutes.
2. Dredge chicken breasts (1/2 per person) in seasoned flour mixture (salt and pepper).
3. In a large skillet, melt butter and peanut oil. Brown chicken on all sides evenly, then remove and keep warm.
4. Add chopped onion (1/2 cup), green peppers (3/4 cup, finely chopped), garlic (1 tsp), and hot curry powder (2 tbsp) to the skillet. Cook and stir until vegetables are wilted.
5. Stir in chopped tomatoes (2 cups, from two cans of Progresso tomato-style with basil). Bring to a boil.
6. Add the chicken back into the skillet. Cover and cook until chicken is cooked through, about 20-30 minutes.
7. Drain and add currents/raisins and slivered almonds. Serve with cooked rice and a good chutney on the side. The sauce and vegetables are based on approximately 2 lbs of chicken breasts (5-6 breast halves). Serves 4-6 people.
